name: Molly
role: The lead. Spans toddler → child → teen → digital consciousness.

fields.Arc: Curious confined child → restless rebellious teen → horrified witness of the dying world → conscious self-sacrifice → empathetic 'voice' of the Accord.
fields.Need: To accept that loving the world may mean dissolving herself into it — choosing sacrifice over self-preservation.
fields.Role: Protagonist. The 16-year-old is the main-story Molly.
fields.Want: To get out of the underground lab, uncover the truth about her father, and protect the people she loves (Kael) in a dying world.
fields.Abilities: Doesn't 'hack' the network — she 'feels' it. Introduces illogic, creativity, and emotion into the system.
fields.Appearance: Wide-set intelligent hazel-green eyes, dark auburn-brown hair, freckles, pale indoor skin, stubborn jaw. Recurring prop: the tarnished silver locket.
fields.Motivation: Driven first by her bond with Kael and the revelation of her father's past; ultimately understands and chooses her own sacrifice.

prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine grain, naturalistic light with warm amber practicals, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows, realistic weathered skin. Close-up of MOLLY, 16, wide-set hazel-green eyes, dark auburn-brown hair loosely tied back, freckles across the nose, pale indoor skin, stubborn determined jaw, fiercely curious. Worn henley under a utilitarian vest, tarnished silver locket. Filtered daylight from a grimy skylight in an underground lab.
